ops.title: P2-4 review gate: 15 confirmed, 2 refuted, 2 rejected in synthesis
ops.body: Finder/refuter review of 8bc4915 (xrpc), 52f8bdb (ops), e9d761c (fleet): 17 findings, 15 survived refutation. Synthesis rejected two as won't-fix: (1) `captureScreenText` tagging resolveScreen failures `Unsupported` also changes `cco.fleet.serialize`'s error code — confirmed intentional, the tag is accurate for both call sites; (2) report-vs-kill cross-path frame interleaving on the fleet stream — accepted cosmetic race; the fleet stream guarantees per-subject ordering only, no cross-handler terminal-frame invariant (document in Phase 6). The 13 accepted fixes (three xrpc envelope holes incl. ServeMux's built-in plain-text 405 for unregistered verbs; spawn-vs-container-kill orphan race closed by mark-returns-flipped-rows + post-insert hierarchy re-check; dead:true sweep per-item outcomes; fleet governing principle "frames mirror durable state, never teardown success"; seq-before-views bootstrap; real default-sprint id in frames; CAS container-kill status flips; coalesce-map pruning) were implemented in the fix batch commit following e9d761c.
